health.title: Configuration status

auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.successResetSent: Reset link sent. Check your inbox.

auth.magicLinkButton: Sign in with a magic link
auth.successMagicSent: Magic link sent! Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

hero.sub: Every name, a star. Every bond, a line of light. Suimini brings your people together and keeps their story alive.
hero.fine: It’s free. No credit card. Your data stays in Europe.

manifesto.lead: As long as a story is told,

testimonials.q: We recovered four lost generations in a single evening.
My father didn’t know his great-grandfather’s name. Now he does.
The AI wrote my grandmother’s biography better than I ever could.

gather.d: Add your loved ones and trace the links. The tree draws itself, readable from great-grandparents down to the youngest.

tell.d: From dates, places and links, Suimini composes the story of your lineage. A memory you read, not just one you file away.

pass.d: Invite the family to contribute, export a booklet, share a link. A story made to pass from hand to hand.

figures.l3: A hundred and fifty years of light.
figures.note: Real lives. True bonds. A living memory.

pricing.heading: Simple and transparent
pricing.sub: Start for free. Upgrade when you’re ready.

cta.sub: Add a first star tonight. The rest of your story will follow, generation after generation.
cta.fine: Free. No credit card. Data in Europe.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Suimini · Crafted with care in France

objet.p1: These terms govern the use of Suimini, a digital genealogy service available at suimini.vercel.app. By using the service, you fully accept these terms.

acces.p1: The service is free for personal use. Registration is required to access connected features.
acces.p2: The free plan includes one tree; an unlimited number of trees is available with a subscription.

compte.p1: Creating an account requires a valid email address. You are responsible for the accuracy and legality of the data you enter.
compte.p2: Recording data about third parties without their consent is prohibited.

donnees.p1: Family trees may contain sensitive data (origins, health data, etc.).
donnees.p2: The user is solely responsible for the content they publish.
donnees.p3: Any data sharing requires the prior consent of the people concerned.

pi.p1: The service, its code and its interface belong to Suimini.
pi.p2: The genealogical data you enter remains your property.
pi.p3: Suimini grants you a simple license to use the service.

resiliation.p1: You may cancel your subscription freely, at any time.
resiliation.p2: The export of your data is guaranteed in GEDCOM format.
resiliation.p3: Your data is deleted within 30 days after termination.

responsabilite.p1: The service is provided "as is". Suimini does not guarantee 24/7 availability and cannot be held liable for interruptions or data loss. We recommend exporting your trees regularly.

droit.p1: These terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the competent court is that of Paris.

contact.p1: For any questions regarding these terms: <mail>contact@suimini.app</mail>.

responsable.p1: The controller of the personal data collected via the service is Suimini (company to be specified).
responsable.p2: For any questions regarding the processing of your data: <mail>contact@suimini.app</mail>.

collectees.intro: Suimini collects the following categories of data:
collectees.compte: Account data — email address, first and last name.
collectees.arbre: Tree data — genealogical data you enter (people, relationships, dates, places).

finalites.intro: Your data is processed for the following purposes:

base.intro: Each processing operation relies on one of the legal bases provided by the GDPR:
base.contrat: Performance of the contract (art. 6.1.b GDPR) — providing the service.

destinataires.intro: To provide the service, Suimini uses technical subprocessors:

duree.actif: Active account — for the entire duration of service use.

droits.p1: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights over your data: the right to access, rectification, erasure, portability and objection.
droits.p2: To exercise these rights, contact us at <mail>contact@suimini.app</mail>.

transferts.intro: Some subprocessors are located outside the European Union. These transfers are governed by appropriate safeguards:

cookies.p1: Suimini uses only cookies necessary for the service to function, namely the authentication session cookie. No advertising tracking cookies are used.

dpo.p1: For any questions regarding the protection of your personal data, you can contact our data protection officer at <mail>contact@suimini.app</mail>.
